name: @htmlgenius/bridge
description: HTML Genius Local Bridge — Chrome Native Messaging host that hands a Change Contract to the user's locally signed-in AI agent (Claude Code CLI / Codex App Server / GitHub Copilot via @github/copilot-sdk). One provider-neutral host; writes only candidate/plan files, never the source HTML.

scripts.verify: npm test && npm run verify:bootstrap && npm run verify:providers
